ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rental_data" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the rental (e.g., WINTER, SPRING) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rental */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the rental (e.g., JAN, FEB) */,
  "holiday" TEXT /* Holiday status of the rental (e.g., NO HOLIDAY, HOLIDAY) */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., SAT, SUN, MON) */,
  "workingday" TEXT /* Working day status (e.g., WORKING DAY, NO WORKING DAY) */,
  "weathersit" TEXT /* Weather situation (e.g., MISTY, GOOD) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Count of bike rentals */,
  "days_since_2011" INTEGER /* Days since January 1, 2011 */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the bike */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "rental_fee" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used during the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_weathersit FOREIGN KEY ("weathersit") REFERENCES weather_situations ("weather_sit_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_workingday FOREIGN KEY ("workingday") REFERENCES working_days ("working_day_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_promotion_code FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_code") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., WINTER, SPRING) */,
  "start_month" TEXT /* Start month of the season (e.g., DEC) */,
  "end_month" TEXT /* End month of the season (e.g., FEB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_situations" (
  "weather_sit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather situation */,
  "weather_sit_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather situation (e.g., MISTY, GOOD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather situation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_sit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday (e.g., NO HOLIDAY, HOLIDAY) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_days" (
  "working_day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working day status */,
  "working_day_name" TEXT /* Name of the working day status (e.g., WORKING DAY, NO WORKING DAY) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the working day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("working_day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date and time of user registration */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike (e.g., CITY, MOUNTAIN) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., AVAILABLE, MAINTENANCE) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)
